_meta.notes: Realized credit values, NOT headline values. Friction rating predicts how much of the credit a typical user will actually capture. The default expected_realized field is a fraction (0.0-1.0) of headline value. Override per-user in profile.json -> credit_realization_overrides for cards held.

credits.name: Airline incidental
credits.notes: Once a guaranteed gift card hack. Now Amex aggressively rejects all but pure fees (baggage, seat assignments). Most users let it expire.

credits.name: Uber Cash
credits.notes: Auto-loads monthly into Uber. December $20 instead of $15. Easy to use if you take Uber or order Uber Eats.

credits.name: Saks Fifth Avenue
credits.notes: $50 semi-annual. Use it for socks, candles, or small gifts. Many users forget the second half.

credits.name: Equinox
credits.notes: Useless unless you would have paid for Equinox anyway ($300/mo). For non-members, near-zero realization.

credits.name: Walmart+
credits.notes: Auto-credits if you sign up. Walmart+ also includes Paramount+ Essential, free shipping, and Sam's Club fuel discounts. Real value if you use any of those.

credits.name: Clear Plus
credits.notes: Useful only if you fly through airports with Clear lanes.

credits.name: Hotel credit (FHR/THC prepaid)
credits.notes: Requires booking at least 2 nights at FHR or THC properties via Amex Travel. If you'd stay at one of those properties anyway, easy.

credits.name: Streaming
credits.notes: $20/month at Disney Bundle, ESPN+, Hulu, Peacock, NYT, WSJ. Easy if you subscribe to any. Often 60-80% realized.

credits.name: Dell tech
credits.notes: $100 semi-annual. Dell pricing often inflates around credit timing. Resale market exists but is not free money.

credits.name: Global Entry / TSA Pre
credits.notes: $120 every 4 years means $30/yr expected, hence low effective annual value. Don't double-count if you have multiple cards offering this.

credits.name: Annual travel credit
credits.notes: Auto-applies to first $300 in travel. Almost everyone realizes full value.

credits.name: DoorDash DashPass
credits.notes: Includes membership + monthly credits. Real value only if you'd otherwise pay for DoorDash. Counts as ad-hoc value.

credits.name: Lyft credit
credits.notes: $10/month auto-credit on Lyft rides. Use it or lose it monthly.

credits.name: Apple TV+ / Music
credits.notes: Auto-credits if you subscribe. If you would not subscribe, near-zero.

credits.name: Sapphire Reserve dining (OpenTable Premier)
credits.notes: Geographically limited curated restaurant list. Realization low for most users; high for SF/NYC/LA OpenTable regulars.

credits.name: Resy credit
credits.notes: $50 semi-annual at Resy restaurants. Easy in major cities.

credits.name: Travel credit
credits.notes: Use via Cap One Travel portal. Most users hit it once on a hotel or flight.

credits.name: Anniversary points
credits.notes: 10K Cap One miles auto-credited each anniversary. 1.5cpp = $150 value.
